Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hey, what do you wanna do now? Karaoke?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}M-Mooommy! Where aaaaaare you!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Hey, what's wrong? Are you lost?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}M-Mommy told me to wait here... and... and... she gave me money, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I'll stay here with you, all right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Hey, look! We can get help over there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}The policeman will know what to do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}He'll find your mom, so don't worry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Phew, what a relief... I'm glad he was able to contact the parents.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}What were they thinking, leaving that poor kid all alone!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Stuff like that really makes me upset![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I guess my own mom's no different.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Sorry, I didn't mean to poke fun at you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Remember what I told you before, how my mom and I aren't very close?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Well, if you asked me what kind of parent she is, I'd say, "a terrible one."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}She wasn't always like that, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}After what happened to Dad, she totally changed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}She's probably living with one of her boyfriends somewhere... Honestly, I'd rather not know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}...Don't you want to know what I mean?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}You must be trying not to pry... Or is that my own wishful thinking?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Well, I guess you're right, it's a personal matter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Even if you did ask, I don't know what I'd say. I have no idea what she's up to these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Probably shacking up with one of her boyfriends. That's about all I know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Anyway, I'm done talking about this, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Um... {f 4 1}-kun, could we keep this between you and me? You're the only one I've told.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari has confided in me about her[n]complicated relationship with her mother.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems we've grown closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Sorry... I'm not in the mood for karaoke anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted with Yukari and[n]went back to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
